purpose: Sample request bodies for CM-48 P10 announcements manual QA. Replace placeholder IDs before use.

announcements.expectedAudience: Residents with active verified membership in Building A only.

body.bodyEn: Water service in Building A will be interrupted on Wednesday from 10:00 AM to 1:00 PM. Please store enough water before the maintenance window.
body.bodyAr: سيتم قطع خدمة المياه في مبنى أ يوم الأربعاء من الساعة 10:00 صباحا حتى 1:00 ظهرا. يرجى تخزين كمية كافية من المياه قبل موعد الصيانة.

body.bodyEn: Starting tonight, all delivery vehicles must be verified against the visitor request before entry. Escalate unmatched passes to the security supervisor.
body.bodyAr: اعتبارا من الليلة، يجب التحقق من جميع سيارات التوصيل من خلال طلب الزيارة قبل السماح بالدخول. يرجى تصعيد التصاريح غير المطابقة إلى مشرف الأمن.

announcements.expectedAudience: All users with active verified membership, hidden before scheduledAt.

body.bodyEn: The owners association meeting will be held tomorrow at 7:00 PM in the clubhouse meeting room.
body.bodyAr: سيعقد اجتماع اتحاد الملاك غدا في الساعة 7:00 مساء في قاعة الاجتماعات بالنادي.

announcements.expectedAudience: Users attached to Unit A-101 only.

body.bodyEn: The association has approved the maintenance request related to Unit A-101. Please acknowledge receipt of this official notice.
body.bodyAr: وافق الاتحاد على طلب الصيانة المتعلق بالوحدة أ-101. يرجى تأكيد الاطلاع على هذا الإشعار الرسمي.

announcements.expectedAudience: Residents on Floor A only until expiresAt, then admin archive/list only.

body.bodyEn: The corridor on your floor will be cleaned today between 4:00 PM and 5:00 PM.
body.bodyAr: سيتم تنظيف الممر في طابقكم اليوم بين الساعة 4:00 مساء و5:00 مساء.

manualAssertions: Create each fixture as an admin, then publish it unless the test requires draft-only behavior.
Check GET /api/v1/my/announcements as every target and non-target test user.
Check GET /api/v1/notifications and unread count for targeted users after immediate publish.
Check POST /api/v1/announcements/{announcement}/acknowledge only for fixtures with requiresAcknowledgement=true.
Check GET /api/v1/announcements/{announcement}/acknowledgements as admin after acknowledgements.
Archive at least one published fixture and confirm it leaves resident feed but remains visible to admins.
